title: Retry deployment after previous failure

requirements.text: Verify all existing frontend components render correctly with the current backend actor implementation
acceptanceCriteria: The bale entry form displays all six input fields (Rd, Trash %, Moisture %, Micronaire, Length, Strength)
Statistics cards show calculated averages for the quality metrics
The bale records table renders with all columns
The header displays the lot reference and current date
The print functionality works without errors

requirements.text: Ensure the Motoko backend actor compiles successfully and exposes all required public methods for bale management
acceptanceCriteria: The backend actor compiles without errors
Public methods for adding bales are accessible from the frontend
Public methods for retrieving all bales are accessible from the frontend
The actor can be deployed to the Internet Computer successfully

requirements.text: Verify the frontend successfully connects to the backend actor using the generated declarations
acceptanceCriteria: The frontend can import and use the backend actor declarations
API calls to the backend complete without connection errors
The useActor hook successfully establishes the connection
Data submitted through the form reaches the backend

constraints: Do not modify the immutable frontend paths (useInternetIdentity.ts, useInternetIdentity.tsx, useActor.ts, main.tsx, components/ui)
Preserve all existing features and functionality
Keep the agricultural/industrial visual theme with neutral colors
nonGoals: Adding new features beyond existing requirements
